title: Phantoms? Less Annoying!
description: A Mod which decreases phantom, health makes them vanish upon hitting you and deal 0 knockback in order to make them less annoying
body:
Ever had a hard time due to phantoms? Getting knocked off a 50 block pillar just because you forgot to sleep?

This mod fixes all that! 

Makes Phantom extremely less annoying to deal with!

- They have Decreased health! (Half a Heart)
- They deal NO knockback!
- They vanish as soon as they hit you!

This mod keeps the aspect of phantom in the game so people can farm Phantom Membrane and other mods such as Dungeon Arise use them as mounts for many guardians of the dungeons. Thus this mod aims to make their impact less annoying towards the player!

Like my project? Consider a like ❤️!
